docs.description: Long-run economic scenarios (to 2100) are produced every 2-3 years to look at factors influencing the global economy that play out over many decades. Different vintages look at a different set of scenarios described in an associated publication. Selected series from these scenarios are available here for individual OECD, accession and G20 economies. A breakdown of the global economy by regions (following World Bank definitions) is also provided.

MEASURE.BSII: Balance of primary income (balance of payments basis)
MEASURE.BSIID: Balance of primary income in USD (balance of payments basis)
MEASURE.BSIIQ: Balance of primary income as a percent of GDP
MEASURE.CAPOG: Net capital outlays of the government
MEASURE.CBGDPR: Current account balance as a percentage of GDP
MEASURE.CBRD: Current account balance in USD, residual item
MEASURE.CFKG: General government consumption of fixed capital
MEASURE.CG: Government final consumption expenditure, nominal value, GDP expenditure approach
MEASURE.CGAA: General government final consumption expenditure, nominal value, appropriation account
MEASURE.CGFLQ: Central government gross financial liabilities as a percentage of GDP
MEASURE.CGFLQ_DESK: Central government gross financial liabilities as a percentage of GDP, specific definition
MEASURE.CGFL_DESK: Central government gross financial liabilities, specific definition
MEASURE.CGINTP_DESK: Gross central government interest payments, specific definition
MEASURE.CGINTR_DESK: Gross central government interest receipts, specific definition
MEASURE.CGV_ANNPCT: Government final consumption expenditure, volume, growth
MEASURE.CNINTP_DESK: Net general government interest payments, specific definition
MEASURE.CP: Private final consumption expenditure, nominal value, GDP expenditure approach
MEASURE.CPAA: Private final consumption expenditure, nominal value, appropriation account
MEASURE.CPIDR: Indicator of competitiveness based on relative consumer prices
MEASURE.CPIF: Consumer price index with fixed interest rates
MEASURE.CPV_ANNPCT: Private final consumption expenditure, volume, growth
MEASURE.CQ_FBGSV: Net exports, contributions to changes in real GDP
MEASURE.CQ_ISKV: Change in inventories, contributions to changes in real GDP
MEASURE.CTGSVD: Contribution to world trade growth, goods and services (in USD, OECD reference year prices)
MEASURE.EQPF: Adjustment for the change in net equity of households in pension fund reserves
MEASURE.ER1574: Employment rate, supply definition, as a percentage of population aged 15-74
MEASURE.ERS1574: Trend employment rate, as a percentage of population aged 15-74
MEASURE.EXCH: Exchange rate, USD per national currency
MEASURE.EXCHEB: Nominal effective exchange rate, chain-linked, overall weights
